name: Punch Bowl Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 Cans Thank You brand vanilla pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cake according to package directions in 2 round pans (8 or 9-inch).
2. Place one layer of cake in the bottom of the punch bowl.
3. Spread 1 can of vanilla pudding on top.
4. Drain the juice from 1 can of pineapple and place it aside.
5. Slice 3 bananas and dip them in the drained pineapple juice.
6. Place the banana slices on top of the pudding.
7. Put the remaining drained pineapple on top of the bananas.
8. Place the second layer of cake on top.
9. Repeat steps 3-7 with the remaining pudding, bananas, and pineapple juice.
10. Arrange 2 containers of sliced sweetened strawberries (thawed) on top.
11. Finish with Cool Whip and Planters Nut Topping.
